value:
I understand how concerning this must be—if you're seeing an unrecognized phone number on your Apple ID, that's definitely worth addressing right away.

Unfortunately, Apple ID account recovery is something Apple's own support team handles directly, as they'll need to verify your identity and access your account securely. I'd recommend reaching out to Apple Support immediately at support.apple.com or calling them directly—they can help you regain control of your account and remove any unauthorized contact information.

In the meantime, if you're able to access your device, you can also try signing out of your Apple ID in Settings to help secure things until Apple Support gets you sorted. They're equipped to handle this kind of situation and will get you back in control of your account.
